sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Real-time Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game uses real-time action-based movement and combat, similar to Secret of Mana. Player controls boy character with AI-controlled dog companion.

special_mechanics.name: Run Gauge
special_mechanics.description: Percentage gauge located below hit points determines running distance. Gauge falls to 0% when running or attacking, then recharges to allow full sprint when full.

special_mechanics.name: Two-character Control
special_mechanics.description: Player can switch control between boy and dog characters, with the non-controlled character operating under AI. Both characters share similar movement mechanics.

tier_notes: Tier 2 data - No precise physics parameters documented. Game is action RPG with real-time movement and combat similar to Secret of Mana. Sources contain game design and development information but no quantified movement physics values.
sources_used: data_crystal - ROM technical specs and development notes
tcrf - Debug information and gameplay mechanics
wikipedia - Gameplay mechanics and movement description
